193 F1G F1G_NONE_ABOVE (F1G) None of Above Sense of Initiative CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: sense of initiative/invovlement - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
194 F2A F2A_CONFLICT_STAFF (F2A) Covert/Open Conflict with Staff CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - covert/open conflict with staff. 0 = No, 1 = Yes,
